title: B1 Listening Part 1 - Test 31
instructions: For each question, listen to the short recording and choose the correct picture: A, B or C.

questions.context: You hear two people talking about a lost headphones.
questions.audio_script: Woman: Did you find your headphones? You looked everywhere this morning. || Man: Not at first. I went back to the computer room, because I remembered using them in English practice there. || Woman: What about the changing rooms? You were there later. || Man: I checked, but it was not there. Then my sister called and said [1]my headphones was in her car beside the back door[/1]. I must have left it there before school. || Woman: That is lucky. You need it today, don't you? || Man: Yes, I'll collect it before lunch.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: Did you find your headphones? You looked everywhere this morning.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: Not at first. I went back to the computer room, because I remembered using them in English practice there.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: What about the changing rooms? You were there later.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: I checked, but it was not there. Then my sister called and said my headphones was in her car beside the back door. I must have left it there before school.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: That is lucky. You need it today, don't you?

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: Yes, I'll collect it before lunch.

questions.question: Where is the headphones?

B.imagePrompt: Simple Cambridge exam illustration style, headphones on a computer desk, no text or labels, flat educational drawing, black and white line art, minimal details, clean white background.

questions.explanation: The speaker says the headphones was in her car beside the back door.

questions.context: You hear two people talking about buying birthday present for my brother.
questions.audio_script: Boy: I need to buy birthday present for my brother, but I cannot decide. I first thought about a trainers. || Girl: That might be nice. What about a headphones? || Boy: I looked at one, but it was too expensive. In the end, [1]I chose a football because he joined the school team last week[/1]. || Girl: That sounds useful, and it is better than buying something just because it looks pretty. || Boy: I agree. I will wrap it when I get home tonight. || Boy: That gives us enough time, so let's not worry.

questions.context: You hear two people talking about a part-time job at a bookshop.
questions.audio_script: Man: What job are you doing at the bookshop this afternoon? I thought you had to clean the windows. || Boy: I did last week, but Sam did that before lunch. || Man: Are you going to carry boxes upstairs then? || Boy: No, because the lift is not working. The manager just told me that [1]I need to put new books on the shelves[/1]. || Man: That sounds easier than the other jobs. || Boy: Maybe, but I still have to finish before five, because the place gets busy then.

questions.context: You hear two people talking about jobs at home.
questions.audio_script: Girl: What job do you have to do at home Saturday morning? I thought you were going to wash the car. || Boy: No, Dad is doing that. || Girl: Then are you going to tidy the garage? || Boy: Not today, because we need more time for it. Mum said [1]my job is to clean the windows[/1]. || Girl: That should not take too long. || Boy: I hope not. I want to finish before my friend comes round, so we can go out together. || Boy: That gives us enough time, so let's not worry.

questions.context: You hear two friends making plans after school.
questions.audio_script: Man: Are we still cycling by the river after school? I brought everything for it. || Woman: I don't think so. My bike chain broke, so it will not work today. || Man: We could try the cinema instead. || Woman: I thought about that, but the film is too late. My cousin sent me a message, and [1]we are going climbing indoors this afternoon instead[/1]. || Man: Fine. Shall we meet by the bus stop at four? || Woman: Yes, and bring your student card, because they sometimes ask for it.

questions.context: You hear an announcement about the photography club.
questions.audio_script: Speaker: Please listen carefully if you are joining the photography club today. It will not be in its usual place. Some students may go to the art room, but the art exam is taking place there. Others may wait near the library, although it closes early today. [1]Everyone should go straight to the science lab after lunch[/1]. Please tell any friends who arrive late, because the activity will start as soon as the teacher is ready. You do not need to bring anything extra.

dialogue.speaker: speaker
dialogue.text: Please listen carefully if you are joining the photography club today. It will not be in its usual place. Some students may go to the art room, but the art exam is taking place there. Others may wait near the library, although it closes early today. Everyone should go straight to the science lab after lunch. Please tell any friends who arrive late, because the activity will start as soon as the teacher is ready. You do not need to bring anything extra.

questions.context: You hear two people talking about something broken in a kitchen.
questions.audio_script: Woman: Something is broken in the kitchen, but I am not sure what. Is it the kettle? || Man: No, it worked this morning. || Woman: Maybe it is the radio. || Man: I checked that too, and Mum turned it off. [1]The problem is the toaster, because it only burns one side of the bread[/1]. || Woman: We should tell someone before it gets worse. || Man: I already wrote a note, and I will show it to Dad when he gets home. || Man: That gives us enough time, so let's not worry.
